description_long: This object is a modern, tactical shotgun with a robust, angular design and a matte black finish. The body features a prominent upper receiver with a ribbed texture and a visible ejection port, suggesting a semi-automatic or pump-action mechanism. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a metallic muzzle and a secondary tube beneath, likely for the magazine. The grip is ergonomic and pistol-style, and the stock is compact and integrated, lacking a traditional shoulder rest. There are several visible screws and seams, indicating modular construction, and a rail system on top for mounting optics or accessories. The overall appearance is utilitarian and suited for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, tactical black shotgun with a compact stock, ribbed upper receiver, and short, thick barrel. Features a pistol grip and modular construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, secondary tube below, and the ribbed upper receiver.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the full length, pistol grip, compact stock, and rail system on top.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1 but with more detail on the ejection port and magazine tube.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a visible magazine tube below; ribbed upper receiver and short barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
